# Direct local object-store Cloud Sync e2e: two independent vaults converge and preserve conflicts.
exec pinax init device-a --title 'Device A' --json
stdout '"command":"vault.init"'
exec pinax init device-b --title 'Device B' --json
stdout '"command":"vault.init"'

exec sh -c 'mkdir -p device-a/notes && printf "# Alpha\n\nfrom device A\n" > device-a/notes/alpha.md'

exec pinax cloud login --endpoint file://$WORK/object-store --workspace personal --device laptop --secret-ref env://PINAX_SYNC_SECRET --vault device-a --json
stdout '"command":"cloud.login"'
! stdout 'PINAX_SYNC_SECRET'
exec pinax cloud login --endpoint file://$WORK/object-store --workspace personal --device desktop --secret-ref env://PINAX_SYNC_SECRET --vault device-b --json
stdout '"command":"cloud.login"'
! stdout 'PINAX_SYNC_SECRET'

exec pinax sync push --target cloud --vault device-a --yes --json
stdout '"command":"sync.push"'
stdout '"status":"success"'
stdout '"remote_write":true'
! stdout 'from device A'

exec pinax sync pull --target cloud --vault device-b --yes --json
stdout '"command":"sync.pull"'
stdout '"status":"success"'
stdout '"remote_write":false'
stdout '"files_applied":1'
grep 'from device A' device-b/notes/alpha.md

exec sh -c 'printf "# Alpha\n\nlocal desktop edit\n" > device-b/notes/alpha.md'
exec sh -c 'printf "# Alpha\n\nupdated from device A\n" > device-a/notes/alpha.md'

exec pinax sync push --target cloud --vault device-a --yes --json
stdout '"command":"sync.push"'
stdout '"status":"success"'
stdout '"remote_write":true'
! stdout 'updated from device A'

exec pinax sync pull --target cloud --vault device-b --yes --json
stdout '"command":"sync.pull"'
stdout '"status":"success"'
grep 'updated from device A' device-b/notes/alpha.md
exec sh -c 'grep "local desktop edit" device-b/notes/*.conflict.md'

# Delete markers converge project registry state and keep a restorable local tombstone.
exec pinax project create history --name History --notes-prefix notes/history --vault device-a --json
stdout '"command":"project.create"'
exec pinax project create history --name History --notes-prefix notes/history --vault device-b --json
stdout '"command":"project.create"'

exec pinax project delete history --vault device-a --yes --json
stdout '"command":"project.delete"'
stdout '"status":"success"'

exec pinax sync push --target cloud --vault device-a --yes --json
stdout '"command":"sync.push"'
stdout '"delete_markers":"1"'
stdout '"remote_write":true'

exec sh -c 'pinax sync pull --target cloud --vault device-b --yes --json > pull-delete.json'
grep '"command":"sync.pull"' pull-delete.json
grep '"delete_markers_applied":"1"' pull-delete.json
grep '"remote_write":false' pull-delete.json

exec sh -c 'pinax project list --vault device-b --json > projects-after-delete.json'
! grep 'history' projects-after-delete.json
exec sh -c 'pinax trash list --vault device-b --json > trash-after-delete.json'
grep 'project/history' trash-after-delete.json

exec pinax trash restore project/history --vault device-b --json
stdout '"command":"trash.restore"'
stdout '"status":"success"'
exec pinax project list --vault device-b --json
stdout 'history'
